full_text:
Yin De
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yin De. Joined Tao Qian’s petition for Zhu Jun to try and rescue Emperor Xian. Yin De was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Tao Qian.
